Since the NG postcode area is defined as "a group of postcode districts around **Nottingham**" and Gamston is explicitly part of the "West Bridgford postcode of **NG2**," Gamston is located within the NG postcode area. Therefore, the distance from the center of the NG postcode area (Nottingham) to Gamston is approximately **3 miles**.
